title: Poets, Lyricists and Creative Writers
description: Create original written works, such as scripts, essays, prose, poetry or song lyrics, for publication or performance.

tasks.text: Write fiction or nonfiction prose, such as short stories, novels, biographies, articles, descriptive or critical analyses, and essays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop factors such as themes, plots, characterizations, psychological analyses, historical environments, action, and dialogue to create material.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Revise written material to meet personal standards and to satisfy needs of clients, publishers, directors, or producers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Choose subject matter and suitable form to express personal feelings and experiences or ideas, or to narrate stories or events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare works in appropriate format for publication, and send them to publishers or producers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct research to obtain factual information and authentic detail, using sources such as newspaper accounts, diaries, and interviews.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with clients, editors, publishers, or producers to discuss changes or revisions to written material.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan project arrangements or outlines, and organize material accordingly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Follow appropriate procedures to get copyrights for completed work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend book launches and publicity events, or conduct public readings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write narrative, dramatic, lyric, or other types of poetry for publication.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write words to fit musical compositions, including lyrics for operas, musical plays, and choral works.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adapt text to accommodate musical requirements of composers and singers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write humorous material for publication, or for performances such as comedy routines, gags, and comedy shows.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other writers on specific projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
